summary: Comprehensive testing of GameShop Nepal e-commerce app after repository swap. All core functionality verified working - homepage, products, admin panel, staff management, orders, categories, and checkout flow.
critical_code_review_comments: Rate limiting (30 login/minute) may cause 429 during heavy testing - working as designed for security
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed orders created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Rate limiting (30/minute) on login endpoint - wait 60 seconds between test batches if hitting 429 errors.

homepage.details: GSN branding, Trustpilot reviews, customer reviews, products grid with categories, footer with social links

product_detail_page.details: Product title, variations with pricing, quantity selector, ORDER NOW and ADD TO CART buttons, description

admin_login.details: Login at /panelgsnadminbackend/login with gsnadmin/gsnadmin works, redirects to dashboard

admin_dashboard.details: Shows stats (2 Categories, 5 Products, 20 Reviews, 5 Social Links), Quick Actions, Welcome message

admin_orders.details: Shows 10 orders with status breakdown (Pending/Confirmed/Completed), search, Update Status buttons

admin_products.details: Shows 5 products (Netflix, Prime Video, Spotify, YouTube, Red Dead), drag reorder, Add Product button

admin_categories.details: Shows 2 categories (SUBSCRIPTIONS, GAME SERVICE) with edit/delete buttons

admin_staff_management.details: Staff list with existing staff member, Add Staff Member button, edit/delete actions, permissions display

staff_crud_api.details: Create, Read, Update, Delete staff members all working via API

checkout_flow.details: ORDER NOW opens modal with form fields, store credits option, promo code, price breakdown, Continue to Payment

customer_otp_auth.details: OTP endpoints working - requires WhatsApp number, sends OTP to email

product_search.details: Advanced search and suggestions endpoints working
